records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan. Do not forget what I'm about to tell you right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't stress how important it is.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Important?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lieutenant Abberline, we have supplied all officers with Mana bullets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lieutenant Abberline, we have supplied all officers with Mana bullets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lieutenant Abberline, we have supplied all officers with Mana bullets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are ready to enter when you give us the orders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, the time has come for me to finally settle this ill-fated relationship with Professor Moriarty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, the time has come for me to finally settle this ill-fated relationship with Professor Moriarty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, the time has come for me to finally settle this ill-fated relationship with Professor Moriarty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Attention all officers!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Attention all officers!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Attention all officers!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am Lieutenant Fredrick Abberline, the one in charge of the case by royal decree!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am Lieutenant Fredrick Abberline, the one in charge of the case by royal decree!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am Lieutenant Fredrick Abberline, the one in charge of the case by royal decree!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you all know who I am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you all know who I am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you all know who I am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the recent Midnight Killer cases, Scotland Yard's reputation has plummeted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the recent Midnight Killer cases, Scotland Yard's reputation has plummeted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the recent Midnight Killer cases, Scotland Yard's reputation has plummeted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In just one month, four women have fallen victim, and society is in chaos.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In just one month, four women have fallen victim, and society is in chaos.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In just one month, four women have fallen victim, and society is in chaos.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Riots are constantly breaking out on the streets, and now, even the royal family is being threatened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Riots are constantly breaking out on the streets, and now, even the royal family is being threatened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Riots are constantly breaking out on the streets, and now, even the royal family is being threatened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, London is on the verge of being engulfed by the fog of madness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, London is on the verge of being engulfed by the fog of madness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, London is on the verge of being engulfed by the fog of madness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, you all stand here today!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, you all stand here today!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, you all stand here today!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter the blames, the sneers, and the insults you all received...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter the blames, the sneers, and the insults you all received...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter the blames, the sneers, and the insults you all received...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every officer here has stood their ground and held on to their beliefs!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every officer here has stood their ground and held on to their beliefs!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every officer here has stood their ground and held on to their beliefs!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And now, in this moment! The opportunity has come to cleanse that shame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And now, in this moment! The opportunity has come to cleanse that shame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And now, in this moment! The opportunity has come to cleanse that shame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With each one of your beliefs, the case will reach a turning point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With each one of your beliefs, the case will reach a turning point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With each one of your beliefs, the case will reach a turning point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that in the future, there will be no shame in the cynical records of history.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that in the future, there will be no shame in the cynical records of history.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that in the future, there will be no shame in the cynical records of history.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I expect all officers to do their best in this operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I expect all officers to do their best in this operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I expect all officers to do their best in this operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I ask all officers...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I ask all officers...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I ask all officers...

records.m_Talk_ENG: to enter at the sound of the <color=#ffd34c>gunshot</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: to enter at the sound of the <color=#ffd34c>gunshot</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: to enter at the sound of the <color=#ffd34c>gunshot</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I applaud your acting, but all the information about what happens in London is in the palm of my hand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I applaud your acting, but all the information about what happens in London is in the palm of my hand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I applaud your acting, but all the information about what happens in London is in the palm of my hand.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Since London's Shadow incident. And working under you, doing all your dirty work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You arrived just in time, my friend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You arrived just in time, my friend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You arrived just in time, my friend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great work. It must have been an agonizing three years, my old friend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great work. It must have been an agonizing three years, my old friend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great work. It must have been an agonizing three years, my old friend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's all over now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's all over now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's all over now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Admit your defeat, Professor Moriarty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Admit your defeat, Professor Moriarty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Admit your defeat, Professor Moriarty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, so this was your plan...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, so this was your plan...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, so this was your plan...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would've never imagined that the <color=#ffd34c>Colonel</color> would be the spy...

records.m_Talk_FRA: I would've never imagined that the <color=#ffd34c>Colonel</color> would be the spy...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's elementary, my dear Professor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's elementary, my dear Professor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's elementary, my dear Professor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Three years ago, it was our utter defeat during the Shadow incident in London.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Three years ago, it was our utter defeat during the Shadow incident in London.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Three years ago, it was our utter defeat during the Shadow incident in London.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Casualties were in the hundreds, and it was the start of the discrimination against Supernaturals.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Casualties were in the hundreds, and it was the start of the discrimination against Supernaturals.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Casualties were in the hundreds, and it was the start of the discrimination against Supernaturals.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, we devised a plan to defeat you, who was behind it three years ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, we devised a plan to defeat you, who was behind it three years ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, we devised a plan to defeat you, who was behind it three years ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was done so that we could catch you off guard when it was most important.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was done so that we could catch you off guard when it was most important.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was done so that we could catch you off guard when it was most important.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I've been played all this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I've been played all this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I've been played all this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard your assistant left town after he got married... Was that information false?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard your assistant left town after he got married... Was that information false?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard your assistant left town after he got married... Was that information false?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was. Because unlike me, my friend here hadn't been exposed to the public.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was. Because unlike me, my friend here hadn't been exposed to the public.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was. Because unlike me, my friend here hadn't been exposed to the public.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And being an excellent sharpshooter, he was a perfect fit for you as you preferred soldiers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And being an excellent sharpshooter, he was a perfect fit for you as you preferred soldiers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And being an excellent sharpshooter, he was a perfect fit for you as you preferred soldiers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But then again, you weren't so easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But then again, you weren't so easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But then again, you weren't so easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In order to not raise any suspicion, my friend had to do all your dirty work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In order to not raise any suspicion, my friend had to do all your dirty work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In order to not raise any suspicion, my friend had to do all your dirty work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And with everything falling into place, you are now rolling in the dirt as a result.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And with everything falling into place, you are now rolling in the dirt as a result.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And with everything falling into place, you are now rolling in the dirt as a result.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, it's time you face the law for your misdeeds, James Moriarty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, it's time you face the law for your misdeeds, James Moriarty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, it's time you face the law for your misdeeds, James Moriarty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The law? Interesting.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The law? Interesting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about your precious partner?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about your precious partner?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about your precious partner?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Murder, arson, drug smuggling... For the last three years, he has also committed all manners of crime under my order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Murder, arson, drug smuggling... For the last three years, he has also committed all manners of crime under my order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Murder, arson, drug smuggling... For the last three years, he has also committed all manners of crime under my order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, all due to your brilliant <color=#ffd34c>plan</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, all due to your brilliant <color=#ffd34c>plan</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, all due to your brilliant <color=#ffd34c>plan</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm curious as to how you feel about all this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm curious as to how you feel about all this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm curious as to how you feel about all this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it like? To have turned your friend into a criminal yourself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it like? To have turned your friend into a criminal yourself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it like? To have turned your friend into a criminal yourself?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up. I chose to do it because I wanted to!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up. I chose to do it because I wanted to!

records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll also receive my punishment after all this is over!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll also receive my punishment after all this is over!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But before that, putting you and that Revenger on death row is first!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is a shame that I won't be able to witness what the golden dawn will bring down to this world, but.

records.m_Talk_FRA: There is only one sacrificial offering left for the angel's descent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Magnum Opus. So the Midnight Killer, my final masterpiece, will no longer be bothered.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Magnum Opus. So the Midnight Killer, my final masterpiece, will no longer be bothered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take everyone here down with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take everyone here down with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take everyone here down with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Abberline, I'm all right...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Abberline, I'm all right...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Abberline, I'm all right...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, hurry...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, hurry...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, hurry...!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see if you have the guts to do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see if you have the guts to do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I'm prepared to accept my death if it is for the public good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I'm prepared to accept my death if it is for the public good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I'm prepared to accept my death if it is for the public good.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes... There is no one who entertains me as much as you.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I won't say no.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! ABBERLINE...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan. Do not forget what I'm about to tell you right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't stress how important it is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lieutenant Abberline, we have supplied all officers with Mana bullets.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lieutenant Abberline, we have supplied all officers with Mana bullets.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lieutenant Abberline, we have supplied all officers with Mana bullets.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, the time has come for me to finally settle this ill-fated relationship with Professor Moriarty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, the time has come for me to finally settle this ill-fated relationship with Professor Moriarty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, the time has come for me to finally settle this ill-fated relationship with Professor Moriarty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Attention all officers!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Attention all officers!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Attention all officers!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am Lieutenant Fredrick Abberline, the one in charge of the case by royal decree!

root.m_Talk_FRA: I am Lieutenant Fredrick Abberline, the one in charge of the case by royal decree!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you all know who I am.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you all know who I am.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you all know who I am.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With the recent Midnight Killer cases, Scotland Yard's reputation has plummeted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With the recent Midnight Killer cases, Scotland Yard's reputation has plummeted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With the recent Midnight Killer cases, Scotland Yard's reputation has plummeted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In just one month, four women have fallen victim, and society is in chaos.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In just one month, four women have fallen victim, and society is in chaos.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In just one month, four women have fallen victim, and society is in chaos.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Riots are constantly breaking out on the streets, and now, even the royal family is being threatened.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, London is on the verge of being engulfed by the fog of madness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, you all stand here today!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, you all stand here today!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter the blames, the sneers, and the insults you all received...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter the blames, the sneers, and the insults you all received...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter the blames, the sneers, and the insults you all received...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every officer here has stood their ground and held on to their beliefs!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every officer here has stood their ground and held on to their beliefs!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every officer here has stood their ground and held on to their beliefs!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And now, in this moment! The opportunity has come to cleanse that shame.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And now, in this moment! The opportunity has come to cleanse that shame.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And now, in this moment! The opportunity has come to cleanse that shame.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With each one of your beliefs, the case will reach a turning point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With each one of your beliefs, the case will reach a turning point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With each one of your beliefs, the case will reach a turning point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that in the future, there will be no shame in the cynical records of history.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that in the future, there will be no shame in the cynical records of history.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that in the future, there will be no shame in the cynical records of history.

root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I ask all officers...

root.m_Talk_ENG: to enter at the sound of the <color=#ffd34c>gunshot</color>.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Great work. It must have been an agonizing three years, my old friend.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Admit your defeat, Professor Moriarty.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, so this was your plan...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's elementary, my dear Professor.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's elementary, my dear Professor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Three years ago, it was our utter defeat during the Shadow incident in London.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Three years ago, it was our utter defeat during the Shadow incident in London.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Three years ago, it was our utter defeat during the Shadow incident in London.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Casualties were in the hundreds, and it was the start of the discrimination against Supernaturals.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Casualties were in the hundreds, and it was the start of the discrimination against Supernaturals.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, we devised a plan to defeat you, who was behind it three years ago.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, we devised a plan to defeat you, who was behind it three years ago.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, we devised a plan to defeat you, who was behind it three years ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was done so that we could catch you off guard when it was most important.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was done so that we could catch you off guard when it was most important.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was done so that we could catch you off guard when it was most important.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I've been played all this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I've been played all this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I've been played all this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard your assistant left town after he got married... Was that information false?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard your assistant left town after he got married... Was that information false?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard your assistant left town after he got married... Was that information false?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was. Because unlike me, my friend here hadn't been exposed to the public.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was. Because unlike me, my friend here hadn't been exposed to the public.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was. Because unlike me, my friend here hadn't been exposed to the public.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And being an excellent sharpshooter, he was a perfect fit for you as you preferred soldiers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And being an excellent sharpshooter, he was a perfect fit for you as you preferred soldiers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And being an excellent sharpshooter, he was a perfect fit for you as you preferred soldiers.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But then again, you weren't so easy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In order to not raise any suspicion, my friend had to do all your dirty work.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In order to not raise any suspicion, my friend had to do all your dirty work.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In order to not raise any suspicion, my friend had to do all your dirty work.

root.m_Talk_FRA: And with everything falling into place, you are now rolling in the dirt as a result.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, it's time you face the law for your misdeeds, James Moriarty.

root.m_Talk_DEU: What about your precious partner?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What about your precious partner?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Murder, arson, drug smuggling... For the last three years, he has also committed all manners of crime under my order.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Murder, arson, drug smuggling... For the last three years, he has also committed all manners of crime under my order.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, all due to your brilliant <color=#ffd34c>plan</color>.

root.m_Talk_FRA: What is it like? To have turned your friend into a criminal yourself?

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not my preference to step forward, but I'll have to make an exception.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-Abberline...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-Abberline...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-Abberline...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Seeing that face, my prediction was right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Seeing that face, my prediction was right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Seeing that face, my prediction was right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that this poor actress is someone terribly important to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that this poor actress is someone terribly important to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that this poor actress is someone terribly important to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Isn
8kt that right?

Isn
8kt that right?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Isn
8kt that right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't shoot, Watson!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't shoot, Watson!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't shoot, Watson!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Snap out of it! I know you have been searching for her for a long time! But you must choose!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Snap out of it! I know you have been searching for her for a long time! But you must choose!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Snap out of it! I know you have been searching for her for a long time! But you must choose!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we let him live, Moriarty will use her as a hostage to try to escape!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we let him live, Moriarty will use her as a hostage to try to escape!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we let him live, Moriarty will use her as a hostage to try to escape!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Trust me. Like you always have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Trust me. Like you always have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Trust me. Like you always have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-ngh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-ngh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-ngh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think? It is the <color=#ffd34c>Staff</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think? It is the <color=#ffd34c>Staff</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think? It is the <color=#ffd34c>Staff</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's one of the potent Curios owned by the Golden Dawn.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's one of the potent Curios owned by the Golden Dawn.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's one of the potent Curios owned by the Golden Dawn.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With this amount of power, it can wipe everything off clean. You and all the evidence left in this facility.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With this amount of power, it can wipe everything off clean. You and all the evidence left in this facility.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With this amount of power, it can wipe everything off clean. You and all the evidence left in this facility.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How shortsighted. You won't be safe either if you use that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How shortsighted. You won't be safe either if you use that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How shortsighted. You won't be safe either if you use that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. My life is running out anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. My life is running out anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. My life is running out anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is a shame that I won't be able to witness what the golden dawn will bring down to this world, but.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is a shame that I won't be able to witness what the golden dawn will bring down to this world, but.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is a shame that I won't be able to witness what the golden dawn will bring down to this world, but.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is only one sacrificial offering left for the angel's descent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is only one sacrificial offering left for the angel's descent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is only one sacrificial offering left for the angel's descent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Magnum Opus. So the Midnight Killer, my final masterpiece, will no longer be bothered.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Magnum Opus. So the Midnight Killer, my final masterpiece, will no longer be bothered.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Magnum Opus. So the Midnight Killer, my final masterpiece, will no longer be bothered.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take everyone here down with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take everyone here down with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take everyone here down with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Abberline, I'm all right...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Abberline, I'm all right...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Abberline, I'm all right...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, hurry...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, hurry...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, hurry...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see if you have the guts to do it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see if you have the guts to do it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see if you have the guts to do it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I'm prepared to accept my death if it is for the public good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I'm prepared to accept my death if it is for the public good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I'm prepared to accept my death if it is for the public good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes... There is no one who entertains me as much as you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes... There is no one who entertains me as much as you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes... There is no one who entertains me as much as you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I won't say no.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I won't say no.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I won't say no.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No! ABBERLINE...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No! ABBERLINE...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No! ABBERLINE...!!
